examples: The semantics of Thai vogue product design was analyzed according to semasiology theory and from interpretation and communication. The new design method was also discussed.
This paper combine the research actuality of cognitive psychology and product semasiology and artificial intelligence. Discuss the language and method of the product design.
Analytic philosophy transcends subjective philosophy in a certain extent through emphasizing meaning of proposition and changing Kant's transcendental category in semasiology.
